# .github/safety-surfaces.txt — BUG-527
#
# Canonical machine-readable list of safety-surface paths. The
# atomic-flip CI guard (.github/scripts/check-atomic-flip.sh) reads
# this file to decide whether a commit's changed-file list intersects
# a safety surface — and if so, requires an atomic catalogue flip
# (delta to docs/quality/fix-registry.md or docs/quality/bugs-remaining.md
# in the same commit).
#
# This file is the SSoT, mirrored by docs/quality/l4-reviewer-checklist.md
# §F. Updates MUST happen in the same commit per BUG-526 §G + the
# `feedback_no_silent_out_of_scope.md` rule.
#
# Format:
#   - One bash-prefix-match pattern per line.
#   - Trailing slash means "directory; match any file under this prefix".
#   - File entries (.ts/.tsx) match exactly.
#   - Lines starting with # are comments. Empty lines are ignored.

# ── API safety surfaces ─────────────────────────────────────────────
apps/api/src/features/medications/
apps/api/src/features/clinical-notes/
apps/api/src/features/llm/
apps/api/src/features/scribe/
apps/api/src/features/ect/
apps/api/src/features/tms/
apps/api/src/features/risk/
apps/api/src/features/advance-directives/
apps/api/src/features/legal/
apps/api/src/features/clozapine/
apps/api/src/features/auth/
apps/api/src/features/audit/
apps/api/src/features/prescriptions/
apps/api/src/features/pathology/
apps/api/src/features/patient-app/
apps/api/src/features/patient-outreach/
apps/api/src/features/power-settings/

# ── Web safety surfaces ─────────────────────────────────────────────
apps/web/src/features/medications/
apps/web/src/features/clinical-notes/
apps/web/src/features/llm/
apps/web/src/features/scribe/
apps/web/src/features/receptionist/
apps/web/src/features/beds/
# BUG-619 — psychiatrist's primary AIMS+metabolic monitoring view is a
# clinical-safety surface (tardive dyskinesia / lipid panel / glucose
# monitoring AHPRA-required surveillance). Registered post-BUG-619
# closure so future regressions on this surface trigger the atomic-flip
# CI guard requiring a catalogue delta in the same commit.
apps/web/src/features/psychiatrist/

# ── Web safety-tab files (named individually per L4 §F) ─────────────
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/MedicationsTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/MedicationHistoryTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/VivaTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/SummaryTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/PathologyTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/MhaTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/LegalTab.tsx
apps/web/src/features/patients/components/detail/tabs/EctTmsTab.tsx

# ── Web shared hooks gating clinical access (BUG-416) ───────────────
apps/web/src/shared/hooks/useModuleVisibility.ts

# ── API shared db helpers gating clinical mutations (BUG-371) ───────
apps/api/src/shared/db/optimisticLock.ts
